metadata.description: P1 — Work model + creator run + system preset + run_intents
P2 — Creative Brief Intake preset + novel-writing wiring
P4 — memory review + fragments daemon routes

cross_cutting.title: rand 0.7.3 cannot be upgraded — blocked by wiremock → http-types upstream

tech_debt_summary.note: V1.33 P1 tri-review complete; gate verdict = Request Changes (4 Critical + key Warnings). 11 new P1 residuals registered. 4 Critical require fix wave before re-QC + QA + Done.

2026-06-04-v1.33-work-model-and-creator-.title: Work create idempotency is not atomic and ignores idempotency write failure
2026-06-04-v1.33-work-model-and-creator-.source: qc2 F-001 (also qc1 W-001, qc3 W-001 — confirmed across tri-review)
2026-06-04-v1.33-work-model-and-creator-.note: create_work does SELECT-then-INSERT-then-record_idempotency outside a transaction; record_idempotency result is `let _ =` swallowed. Concurrent POST /v1/local/works with same client_request_id can produce duplicate works rows. Fix: wrap find+create+record in single sqlx transaction (or use INSERT ... ON CONFLICT at app level with proper error mapping to 409).

2026-06-04-v1.33-work-model-and-creator-.title: All 5 new /v1/local/works* endpoints return 409 Conflict instead of required 401 for missing creator context
2026-06-04-v1.33-work-model-and-creator-.note: `read_active_creator_id(...).ok_or(NexusApiError::Uninitialized)?` maps Uninitialized → 409 CONFLICT (per errors.rs:144). T1 contract §7.2 says 401 Unauthorized for missing creator. Fix: use AuthRequired (existing variant, maps to 401) for works handlers. Note: pre-existing pattern in creators.rs:398 — scope to works for P1.

2026-06-04-v1.33-work-model-and-creator-.title: Missing API contract tests for new /v1/local/works endpoints (T1 §7.5/T6 required works_api.rs)
2026-06-04-v1.33-work-model-and-creator-.scope: tests/works_api.rs (does not exist) — entire crates/nexus-daemon-runtime/tests/ directory is missing
2026-06-04-v1.33-work-model-and-creator-.note: T1 contract §7.5 + T6 explicitly required axum Router + ServiceExt::oneshot tests covering 200/201/400/401/404/409, auth boundary, idempotency 200-vs-201, error shapes. Add the file in P1 fix wave; use preset_management.rs test patterns as template.

2026-06-04-v1.33-work-model-and-creator-.title: append_inspiration response count is wrong under concurrent appends; substr-based JSON append is fragile
2026-06-04-v1.33-work-model-and-creator-.note: Handler fetches record (for verify + count base) *before* calling append_inspiration, returns pre.len()+1. Concurrent appends return wrong (under) counts. JSON append via substr/CASE is atomic (good for no partial loss) but Rust-side count is not; substr logic fragile to non-compact JSON. Fix: re-fetch WorkRecord after successful append, derive count from post state; or use json_array_insert or small Rust append + full UPDATE.

2026-06-04-v1.33-work-model-and-creator-.title: run_intents validation is advisory and does not enforce the locked contract
2026-06-04-v1.33-work-model-and-creator-.note: check_run_intents only warns (not errors) on empty creator run_intents; doesn't require at least one of work_init/work_continue; doesn't reject _system.* claiming work_init/work_continue nor creator claiming system_maintenance; no run_intents_validation tests; GET /v1/local/presets returns run_intents:[] for system+user presets (only embedded parsed). Fix: elevate relevant to Error, tighten predicate per work-experience-model §5.1, parse run_intents for user/system presets too, add the 3 unit tests required by contract §7.5.

2026-06-04-v1.33-work-model-and-creator-.title: CLI creator run / system preset yield raw Network error when daemon down, not friendly DaemonNotRunning hint
2026-06-04-v1.33-work-model-and-creator-.note: Assignment lens required 'clear message' on daemon-down; currently user sees 'Network error: connection refused'. Fix: special-case connection errors in DaemonClient to map to DaemonNotRunning + 'nexus42 daemon start' suggestion. Defer to P1 fix wave — non-blocking but user-facing.

2026-06-04-v1.33-work-model-and-creator-.title: creator run list --status builds query string with format! + raw concatenation, no urlencoding
2026-06-04-v1.33-work-model-and-creator-.target_date: V1.33 P1 fix wave (or backlog if scope tight)
2026-06-04-v1.33-work-model-and-creator-.note: Status value containing &, ?, space produces malformed URL or extra query params. Latent injection vector for query params. Fix: use reqwest::Url or urlencoding::encode for filter values. Low severity (controlled filter set), but cleaner with fix.

2026-06-04-v1.33-work-model-and-creator-.title: system preset list logic inlined in system/mod.rs (151-line edit) and only surfaces embedded presets
2026-06-04-v1.33-work-model-and-creator-.scope: crates/nexus42/src/commands/system/mod.rs (list_system_presets); T1 contract §7.3 named crates/nexus42/src/commands/system/preset.rs as a new file
2026-06-04-v1.33-work-model-and-creator-.note: T1 contract specified new file crates/nexus42/src/commands/system/preset.rs; actual change inlined into system/mod.rs. list_system_presets labels everything 'embedded' even though /v1/local/presets returns embedded+system+user. Fix: either accept contract drift + add comment, or refactor to specified file layout + make list merge all 3 groups.

2026-06-04-v1.33-work-model-and-creator-.title: nexus-local-db::works uses runtime sqlx::query for static DML, bypassing compile-time contract
2026-06-04-v1.33-work-model-and-creator-.scope: crates/nexus-local-db/src/works.rs (entire file); nexus-local-db/AGENTS.md, nexus-daemon-runtime/AGENTS.md require compile-time checked queries
2026-06-04-v1.33-work-model-and-creator-.target_date: V1.33 P1 fix wave (with cargo sqlx prepare)
2026-06-04-v1.33-work-model-and-creator-.note: Static INSERT/SELECT/UPDATE/DELETE use sqlx::query / query_as (runtime) with `// SAFETY:` comments. Conflicts with crate AGENTS.md mandatory compile-time macros. Implementer flagged: switch to query!/query_as! after `cargo sqlx prepare --workspace --all -- --all-targets` and commit updated .sqlx/.

2026-06-04-v1.33-work-model-and-creator-.title: Work API response shape drift — creative_brief/inspiration_log/schedule_ids returned as raw JSON strings, not parsed structures
2026-06-04-v1.33-work-model-and-creator-.scope: crates/nexus-daemon-runtime/src/api/handlers/works.rs (returns nexus_local_db::WorkRecord directly); T1 contract §7.2 WorkRecord example uses Option<serde_json::Value> and Vec<InspirationLogEntry>
2026-06-04-v1.33-work-model-and-creator-.note: API returns raw WorkRecord where 3 JSON columns are stringified. P2/P4 clients will parse JSON manually or rely on stringified JSON inconsistently. Fix: add API DTO conversion layer that parses JSON columns into the contract shape, or amend the T1 contract and CLI output contract to state these are stringified JSON.

2026-06-04-v1.33-work-model-and-creator-.title: list_works total field returns page size, not total row count — misleading pagination
2026-06-04-v1.33-work-model-and-creator-.note: Pagination consumers may compute `has_more = total > offset + records.len()` and get wrong answer. Fix: separate COUNT(*) query (or document total as page size if intentional).

v1.32-post-qc-tech-debt.title: creator.inject_prompt input_schema doesn't declare prompt_file/vars orchestration-layer args
v1.32-post-qc-tech-debt.source: P2 implementer proposal (qc2 cross-checked; smoke test downgrades as known)
v1.32-post-qc-tech-debt.note: Capability's input_schema doesn't reflect that presets can pass prompt_file + vars which the orchestration engine resolves to prompt at runtime. A4 validator correctly flags this as CapabilityArgDrift on novel-writing + research. Fix requires capability semantics change — out of P2 scope.

v1.32-post-qc-tech-debt.title: research preset uses same creator.inject_prompt drift as novel-writing

v1.31-post-qc-tech-debt.title: Non-atomic queue claim race — claim_prompt_injections SELECT-then-UPDATE without transaction
v1.31-post-qc-tech-debt.note: Single-process SQLite pre-1.0. Wrap in transaction when concurrent access possible.

v1.31-post-qc-tech-debt.title: Keyword LIKE pattern doesn't escape special characters
v1.31-post-qc-tech-debt.note: Add escape_sql_like helper for user-supplied keyword values.

v1.31-post-qc-tech-debt.title: Unbounded IN clause in mark_prompt_injections_consumed
v1.31-post-qc-tech-debt.note: Add batch limit (e.g. 100) and chunk if needed.

v1.31-post-qc-tech-debt.title: Unbounded prompt size in build_summary_prompt — memory/IPC risk
v1.31-post-qc-tech-debt.note: Add configurable content size limit before prompt construction.

v1.31-post-qc-tech-debt.title: Missing prompt injection queue cleanup — table growth
v1.31-post-qc-tech-debt.note: Add daemon maintenance cleanup for expired/consumed rows.

v1.31-post-qc-tech-debt.title: JSON LIKE query performance on memory_fragments degrades with scale
v1.31-post-qc-tech-debt.note: Pre-release volumes low. Consider FTS5 or keyword index at scale.

v1.31-post-qc-tech-debt.title: parse_judge_response keyword matching can produce false positives from LLM output
v1.31-post-qc-tech-debt.note: GO/NOGO word list matches substrings in LLM output. Consider regex anchors or parse first word of response.

v1.31-post-qc-tech-debt.title: memory-augmented preset exit_when kind:rule without rule expression — may need explicit always_true
v1.31-post-qc-tech-debt.note: P2 resolved: exit_when kind:rule is explicit always-true, locked by test memory_augmented_rule_exit_is_explicit_always_true. Loader treats empty rule as always-true (correct for this preset). Documented in YAML comments and embedded-presets/README.md.

v1.30-post-qc-tech-debt.title: SessionCapture RwLock uses write() for all accesses — cosmetic under single-threaded IPC
v1.30-post-qc-tech-debt.note: Benign in current single-threaded IPC model. Revisit if worker becomes concurrent. Consider parking_lot::RwLock.

v1.30-post-qc-tech-debt.title: cleanup_row fire-and-forget — DELETE failure silently lost, dangling registry rows possible
v1.30-post-qc-tech-debt.note: Add tracing::error on DELETE failure at minimum. Consider awaiting inline with timeout.

v1.30-post-qc-tech-debt.title: JobLifecycleGuard FSM — no RAII guard to ensure mark_done/mark_failed called exactly once
v1.30-post-qc-tech-debt.note: Mark_done now runs before KeyBlock insert (W-001 fix), reducing risk. Full guard would eliminate the class.

v1.30-post-qc-tech-debt.title: Drop timeout 150ms may be insufficient for heavy LLM children — make configurable
v1.30-post-qc-tech-debt.note: PID existence check added (C-4 fix). Configurable timeout via TimeoutConfig would improve safety.

v1.30-post-qc-tech-debt.title: LIST_BY_WORLD_LIMIT=500 silently truncates — no truncation indicator to caller
v1.30-post-qc-tech-debt.note: Pre-release volumes well under 500. Add total_count or has_more field when scale requires it.

v1.30-post-qc-tech-debt.title: mark_running lacks WHERE status guard — can revert done/failed jobs
v1.30-post-qc-tech-debt.note: Add WHERE status='queued' guard to mark_running, mirroring claim_job pattern.

v1.30-post-qc-tech-debt.title: claim_job re-fetches row after commit solely for started_at timestamp
v1.30-post-qc-tech-debt.note: Extra DB round-trip for started_at. Could compute in Rust post-commit. Low priority optimization.

v1.30-post-qc-tech-debt.title: insert_with_retry returns generic Configuration error on collision — should use dedicated type
v1.30-post-qc-tech-debt.note: UUIDv4 makes collision near-impossible. Error type improvement for API clarity.

v1.30-post-qc-tech-debt.title: Dynamic SQL (format!) in reference_source::list and kb_store::list_by_world — not parameterized
v1.30-post-qc-tech-debt.note: Limit/offset now clamped (C-2 fix). format! needed because sqlx offline mode cannot bind LIMIT/OFFSET. Document exception.

v1.30-post-qc-tech-debt.title: Extraction prompt format!() doubles memory for large work entries
v1.30-post-qc-tech-debt.note: Typical work entries are small structured summaries. Streaming approach if large-file support added.

v1.30-post-qc-tech-debt.title: sqlx prepare CI enforcement — ensure offline metadata stays green after query changes
v1.30-post-qc-tech-debt.note: .sqlx/ metadata churn in diff expected after query changes. Add CI step to verify sqlx prepare is current.
